啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊最爱小简[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753790181,"group_id":"7276384138653862966","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3259365206270664"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276384138653862966","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1395"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读53小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1733,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":189199,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7285303216984064808","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来说还不错，个人感觉比斩神前期要好一点，特别是第31章的结尾，真的震惊到我了。题材也蛮新颖的，不愧是三九啊[送心][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696243489,"group_id":"7276384138653862966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"^O^","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3dHJwfCf/IGpBdt0QHJK4nW4+4EYIpzMINpFRsyB4hV","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/84a79faab5374c18aab45991e23a3e34~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776183774&x-signature=Xds7mzTaoQvGLwnGCl7pEaNy8CM%3D","user_id":"3259365206270664","user_name":"塘棠给你吃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3259365206270664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1702990623,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276384138653862966","book_info":{"abstract":"《斩神》作家三九音域全新力作  | 澳门国际科幻奖最佳科幻网络文学 | 逆转时代的中式怪诞巨作
赤色流星划过天际后，人类文明陷入停滞。
从那天起，人们再也无法制造一枚火箭，一颗核弹，一架飞机，一台汽车……近代科学堆砌而成的文明金字塔轰然坍塌，而灾难，远不止此。
灰色的世界随着赤色流星降临，像是镜面后的鬼魅倒影，将文明世界一点点拖入无序的深渊。
在这个时代，人命渺如尘埃；
在这个时代，人类灿若星辰。
大厦将倾，有人见一戏子屹立文明废墟之上，红帔似血，时笑时哭，
时代的帘幕在他身后缓缓打开，他张开双臂，对着累累众生轻声低语——
“好戏……开场。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cdc1c766d5348269a18bcf7e71d7e707","author":"三九音域","author_id":"","book_id":"7276384138653862966","book_name":"我不是戏神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"373.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7276663560427471412","read_count":"3737518","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3850589"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.9","serial_count":"1857","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o99ffbfd13492eb9953715959db26ed9b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1778840918&x-signature=m99vDzZVNDyUj9FDM3q76kK3YPU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104957777655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.85938e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260316182838EAF2A0D046A561F02746"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1705,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4859,"reply_count":40,"show_pv":1045140},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7292302143222072102","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"各个角色的性格塑造也很独特，剧情方面的反转很吸引人，人物们也全部智商在线，很不错的一部小说，如果坚持写下去的话将来出版
